description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a steep, dark gable roof and a partially exposed cross-section revealing a detailed interior layout. The exterior walls are constructed from reddish-brown brick, and the roof is covered with dark gray shingles. The front facade features several windows of varying sizes, with a large window on the upper floor and a smaller one below. The cross-sectional view shows a modern interior with a kitchen, bathroom, living area, and bedrooms, all furnished with contemporary fixtures. The house appears to be well-insulated and designed for urban residential use, with clear separation of living and utility spaces. The overall structure is robust, with hard surfaces and a solid foundation.
description: A two-story brick house with a steep gable roof, multiple windows, and a modern, furnished interior visible in cross-section.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow brick wall and the steep, dark roof with minimal window visibility.
description_view_1: Cross-sectional front view revealing the full interior layout, including rooms, furniture, and fixtures, as well as the gable roof structure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the narrow brick wall and roof, with little detail visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the brick facade with two windows, one large and one small, and the full gable roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch, steps, or decorative columns; minimalistic and functional.
